WITH min_supply AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_cost
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment
FROM part
JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
JOIN min_supply ON part.p_partkey = min_supply.ps_partkey AND partsupp.ps_supplycost = min_supply.min_cost
WHERE part.p_size = 6
  AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
  AND region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
ORDER BY s_acctbal DESC, n_name, s_name, p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'CANADA' and n2.n_name = 'CHINA') or (n1.n_name = 'CHINA' and n2.n_name = 'CANADA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
WITH canada_nation AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey 
    FROM nation 
    WHERE n_name = 'CANADA'
),
china_nation AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey 
    FROM nation 
    WHERE n_name = 'CHINA'
)
SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 'CANADA' AS supp_nation, 'CHINA' AS cust_nation, 
           EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year, 
           l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM supplier
    JOIN canada_nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = canada_nation.n_nationkey
    JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN china_nation ON customer.c_nationkey = china_nation.n_nationkey
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 'CHINA' AS supp_nation, 'CANADA' AS cust_nation, 
           EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year, 
           l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM supplier
    JOIN china_nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = china_nation.n_nationkey
    JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN canada_nation ON customer.c_nationkey = canada_nation.n_nationkey
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burnished%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1996-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_sum AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
),
burnished_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'burnished%'
)
SELECT s.s_name, s.s_address
FROM nation n
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE n.n_name = 'GERMANY'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN burnished_parts bp ON ps.ps_partkey = bp.p_partkey
    JOIN lineitem_sum ls ON ps.ps_partkey = ls.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = ls.l_suppkey
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    AND ps.ps_availqty > ls.half_sum
)
ORDER BY s_name;

lineitem_agg AS (

rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_sums AS (
    SELECT 
        l_partkey, 
        l_suppkey, 
        0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum_quantity
    FROM 
        lineitem
    WHERE 
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        l_partkey, l_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    s.s_name, 
    s.s_address
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    n.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        LEFT JOIN lineitem_sums ls ON ps.ps_partkey = ls.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = ls.l_suppkey
        WHERE

            AND p.p_name LIKE 'burlywood%'

    )

rewritten_query:
SELECT s.s_name, COUNT(*) AS numwait
FROM nation n
JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN lineitem l1 ON s.s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey
JOIN orders o ON l1.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE n.n_name = 'SAUDI ARABIA'
  AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
  AND l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem l2
    WHERE l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
      AND l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem l3
    WHERE l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
      AND l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
      AND l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate
  )
GROUP BY s.s_name
ORDER BY numwait DESC, s.s_name
LIMIT 100;

INNER JOIN orders ON l1.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey AND orders.o_orderstatus = 'F'

    FROM lineitem l2
    WHERE l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey

  AND NOT EXISTS (

      AND l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
